goal: Deepen real MCP interoperability evidence without reopening the whole node platform surface.
successCriteria: Live verify can exercise a real HTTP MCP server across tool, resource, and prompt flows.
Remaining protocol gaps are captured as explicit deferred risks instead of implicit TODOs.
Host and transport evidence can feed the verification report and future promotion decisions.
explicitlyOutOfScope: Rewriting stdio transport or promoting QiniuMCPServer in the same package.
